text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 10 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Pillars of Faith, shake like movable force in a storm
Testing your trust in your God to extremes
Will your conviction withstand contradiction and fight off temptation to
discard your virtues to be true?

Spirits that will dance with the devil, to rhythm of evil
Will take hold if you let them, so repel with all your purity

Wash them away, banish all immorality
Pure is the soul that is bathe in its chastity forever more
To the spirit that prays be not guided by fate
For the spirit of goodness will always lead unto the Lord
